basic_details.job_title: OFH Armapur Hired Medical Practitioner Recruitment 2026 - Walkin
basic_details.short_information: The Ordnance Factory Hospital (OFH Armapur) has officially announced the Hired Medical Practitioner (HMP) Recruitment 2026 with 1 opening. Eligible candidates with a maximum age of 70 years and an MBBS degree recognized by the Medical Council of India (MCI) can attend the walk-in interview on 28 July 2026. The official notification PDF and walk-in interview details are available below.

_labels.notification_pdf: Download OFH Armapur Hired Medical Practitioner (HMP) Job 2026 Notification PDF

all_official_links.label: Download OFH Armapur Hired Medical Practitioner (HMP) Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: OFH Armapur Hired Medical Practitioner Recruitment 2026 - Overview
OFH Armapur Hired Medical Practitioner Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates should download and read the OFH Armapur Jobs 2026 notification PDF carefully to check vacancy details, eligibility, age limit, and application instructions. The notification also includes important dates and selection process details. The direct download link is available in the Important Links section below. Download OFH Armapur Hired Medical Practitioner (HMP) Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: OFH Armapur Hired Medical Practitioner Vacancy Details 2026
Walk-In Procedure
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to attend the walk-in interview for OFH Armapur Hired Medical Practitioner (HMP) Recruitment 2026 should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before attending the interview. Candidates must report at the venue as per the reporting time mentioned in the notification. Carry all original documents along with one set of self-attested photocopies such as ID proof, educational certificates, experience certificates (if required), and category certificate (if applicable). Bring the duly filled application form if required in the notification. Verify eligibility criteria before attending the interview. Candidates are advised to reach the venue well in advance to complete registration formalities. Keep extra passport-size photographs for submission if required.

content_sections.heading: OFH Armapur Hired Medical Practitioner Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to attend the walk-in interview for OFH Armapur HMP recruitment?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview is scheduled for 28 July 2026. Candidates should report at the venue on this date.

faq.question: Q2. What is the post name for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The post name for this recruitment is Hired Medical Practitioner (HMP).

faq.question: Q3. How many vacancies are available for the HMP post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy available for the Hired Medical Practitioner (HMP) post.

faq.question: Q4. What is the educational qualification required for the HMP post?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess an MBBS degree recognized by the Medical Council of India (MCI).

faq.question: Q5. What is the age limit for the HMP post?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Hired Medical Practitioner (HMP) post is 70 years.

faq.question: Q6. What is the salary offered for the HMP position?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive a consolidated salary of Rs. 75,000 per month.

faq.question: Q7. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee for General/OBC and SC/ST categories.

faq.question: Q8. What is the mode of application for this job?
faq.answer: The mode of application is Walk-in Interview. No online application is required.

faq.question: Q9. Where will the walk-in interview be conducted?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview will be conducted at Ordnance Factory Hospital, Armapur, Kanpur, Uttar Pradesh, 208009.

faq.question: Q10. What documents should I carry for the walk-in interview?
faq.answer: Candidates should carry all original documents, one set of self-attested photocopies, ID proof, educational certificates, and other relevant documents as mentioned in the notification.
